Description: Official Create Invoice request payload

Description: One payment allocation entry inside InvoiceRequest
Notes: Canonical internal name; source-published component name is Payment and the spec supports multiple payment allocations

Description: Official Create Invoice response payload
Notes: Reference app uses InvoiceResponse naming

Description: Official Get Status response payload
Notes: Canonical internal name; source-published model name is GetStatusResponse

Description: Official Get Environment Parameters response payload
Notes: Known endpoint members are repeated across official examples while parsers should stay forward-compatible with additional fields

Description: Structured validation error payload with property-level errors
Notes: Official ModelErrors schema extracted from the specification

Description: Official invoice item payload
Notes: Used in InvoiceRequest only in the official spec

Description: Official tax breakdown payload in InvoiceResult
Notes: Returned after fiscalization

Description: Canonical buyer identification value across Serbian flows
Notes: Codebook is extracted and strict per-code regexes remain the only open tightening step

Description: Reference to a prior invoice or relevant document
Notes: Rules depend on invoice and transaction context

Description: Create Invoice output control options
Notes: Canonical internal name; the source table exposes this as an unnamed inline model

Description: Environment endpoint bundle returned by Get Environment Parameters
Notes: Known keys taxpayerAdminPortal taxCoreApi vsdc and root are repeated in official examples and mirrored by the reference app but the object should remain open-ended

Description: Plain text PIN body used by VerifyPin
Notes: Exactly four ASCII digits and reused as the smart-card PIN concept

Description: Plain text general status or error code
Notes: Used by VerifyPin and status arrays

Description: Prefix code used in buyerId to determine identification document kind
Notes: Value always precedes the identifier payload

Description: Prefix code used in buyerCostCenterId to determine optional buyer-purpose field semantics
Notes: Value always precedes the payload after a colon

Description: Secure element version response containing major minor patch segments
Notes: Three unsigned integer version segments in 12 bytes

Description: UID and certificate validity timestamps returned by secure element
Current signed amount and secure element limit payload
Notes: Current extraction captures the exact 7-byte sum and 7-byte limit split

Description: Byte-level command payload sent to secure element for signing
Notes: Current extraction captures the canonical 7-byte amount layout and CRC variant

Description: Byte-level fiscalization payload returned by secure element after signing
Notes: Current extraction captures counters encrypted data signature and optional CRC

Description: Empty invocation marker for replaying the last signed invoice payload through the APDU command
Notes: No command data body is defined; keep only as a symmetry marker if useful

Description: Last signed invoice data replay with same structure as Sign Invoice response
Opaque directive payload received from TaxCore and forwarded to secure element
Notes: 512 byte payload with optional CRC

Description: Property-level validation error entry inside ValidationErrorResponse
Notes: Contains the property path and the associated shared status codes

Description: Normative allowed issuance forms for the Serbian security element
Notes: Extracted from the BE rulebook not from a wire protocol

Description: Normative counter families that the Serbian security element must maintain and increase after each transaction
Notes: Describes legal counter obligations rather than an exposed API schema

Description: Cross-layer secure-element unique identifier used in certificates invoice numbers and status payloads
Notes: Always 8 uppercase alphanumeric characters and stored in the certificate Subject SERIALNUMBER field

Description: Authentication code associated with a PFX certificate for connected fiscalization
Notes: Always 6 uppercase alphanumeric characters

Description: Installation password associated with an issued PFX certificate
Notes: Always 8 uppercase alphanumeric characters

Description: Manufacturer registration code attached to E-SDC products and audit packages
Notes: Canonical three-part format ProductCode-ProductVersionCode-DeviceSerialNumber

Description: Unified invoice-verification hyperlink returned after fiscalization and used for public receipt validation
Notes: Printed QR codes are a machine-readable representation of this URL

Description: Unique POS-generated request identifier used for invoice correlation and last-invoice recovery
Notes: Optional CreateInvoice header with max length 32

Description: Machine-readable receipt verification payload returned from the public verification URL
Notes: Guidance-backed public verification type and not part of the core LPFR protocol schema

Description: Verification payload view of original invoice request metadata
Notes: Guidance-backed nested verification view containing business buyer and payment metadata

Description: One payment allocation entry inside the public verification response
Notes: Guidance-backed verification subtype; applications guide shows numeric enum values

Description: Verification payload view of returned fiscalization metadata
Notes: Guidance-backed nested verification view containing counters invoice number signedBy and sdcTime

Description: Reference certificate metadata shape exposed by the TaxCore certificate library
Notes: Reference-only adapter model and not canonical fiscal protocol truth

Description: Opaque byte payload submitted when finishing a local audit session
Notes: StopAudit flow expects a 256-byte proof payload

Description: Opaque DER-encoded taxpayer certificate exported from the secure element
Notes: Returned by ExportCertificateApdu and used as the source for UID TIN and location metadata

Description: One-byte payload describing remaining secure-element PIN attempts before lockout
Notes: 00 means blocked and non-zero values report remaining tries

Description: Opaque 259-byte public-key payload used to encrypt audit packages
Notes: Contains a 256-byte modulus and a 3-byte exponent

Description: Opaque encrypted audit-data payload exported from the secure element for audit workflows
Notes: Length depends on internal-data size and CRC mode

Description: Opaque encrypted auditRequestPayload returned by StartAuditApdu for submission to TaxCore
Notes: Returned as 260 bytes without CRC or 264 bytes with CRC and is distinct from the published HTTP ProofOfAuditRequest wrapper

Description: Public TaxCore configuration response returned by the Configuration service
Notes: Canonical wrapper for the shared backend response shape; the source section names the service but not a standalone DTO

Description: Public TaxCore tax-rates response returned by the Tax Rates service
Notes: Contains currentTaxRates and allTaxRates and complements the tax metadata exposed by GetStatusResponse

Description: Published tax-rate-group structure reused by shared TaxCore services and GetStatusResponse
Notes: Source model is named explicitly and examples show nested taxCategories arrays

Description: Published tax-category structure inside TaxRateGroup
Notes: Source model table names field type while examples serialize categoryType

Description: Published tax-rate structure inside TaxCategory
One environment entry returned by the Environments service
Notes: The service response is an array of these objects

Description: Base64 encoded raw X509 public-key certificate returned by the Encryption Certificate service
Notes: Transport payload is a JSON string rather than an object

Description: Published token response used by E-SDC backend services
Notes: Token is reused for other TaxCore.API E-SDC operations until expiresAt

Description: Normalized request-body primitive for E-SDC boolean-flag operations
Notes: Namespace-scoped canonical transport primitive because the reviewed text alternates between quoted string true or false and a bare JSON boolean example

Description: Published E-SDC command structure returned by backend command services
Notes: Responses are arrays of Command objects

Description: Published audit package request model submitted to the E-SDC audit endpoint
Notes: JSON wrapper around encrypted audit data

Description: Published audit-submission response containing verification status and optional commands
Notes: Status meanings are documented separately and extend beyond the abbreviated inline enum shown next to the model

Description: Published audit-proof request model submitted to the E-SDC audit-proof endpoint
Notes: Distinct from the opaque Start Audit APDU output which becomes auditRequestPayload after Base64 encoding

Description: Canonical wrapper for the top-level array response returned by the Environments service
Notes: Introduced to keep contract output references closed without relying on raw [] notation

Description: Canonical wrapper for top-level array responses that contain Command entries
Notes: Used by GetInitializationCommands and NotifyOnlineStatus to avoid raw [] notation in contract references
